questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: Paragraph All the elements of long from of periodic table can be divided into four blocks s, p, $\mathbf{d}$ and $\mathbf{f}$. The ionization energies, electron affinities electro negativities, atomic and ionic radii and other physical properties usually shown a regular pattern of change within a group or along period with some irregularities.Question Which of the following properties among halogens decreases(s) from chlorine to iodine?
options: Hydration energy of monovalent gaseous anion (magnitude)
